case_title: KATHLEEN DE LEON VS. JOHN PHILLIP WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE BY PLTF. (SAME WAS FILED ON A REQUEST TO POSTPONE FORM). FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LEON, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN PHILLIP WILLIAMS, JOSEPH OLIVER
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-09-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-12-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO JOSEPH OLIVER WILLIAMS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DE LEON, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN PHILLIP WILLIAMS, JOSEPH OLIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY DE LEON, KATHLEEN WILLIAMS, JOHN PHILLIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOSEPH OLIVER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JOHN PHILLIP WILLIAMS, JOSEPH OLIVER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
